testcase.name: backoffGrowthRate shouldDoubleEachTime
testcase.system-out: timestamp = 2026-06-12T16:16:31.636402, GraphApiExponentialBackoffPropertyTest:backoffGrowthRate shouldDoubleEachTime = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 10 | # of calls to property checks = 10 | # of not rejected calls generation = EXHAUSTIVE | parameters are exhaustively generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 0 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 0 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 3831626507210165627 | random seed to reproduce generated values

testcase.name: nonRateLimitErrors shouldNotBeIdentifiedAsRetriable
